options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage <fileName> # output LEF filename

options.name: -all_auto_generated_via
options.description: Writes auto generated vias from generateVias command

options.name: -lef_layer_order
options.description: Write layers specified in lefLayerOrder constraint only

options.name: -macro_list
options.description: write macros specified in macro list

options.name: -macro_only
options.description: Writes macro only data to LEF file

options.name: -no_property
options.description: Writes data in LEF file without any properties

options.name: -tech_only
options.description: Writes tech only data to LEF file

options.name: -use_spacing_table_default
options.description: Writes DEFAULT value of SPACINGTABLE in LEF file
